definitions: A self-contained, often futuristic, workstation or personal space designed with principles of ergonomics to maximize comfort, efficiency, and user well-being.
A specialized, enclosed unit, frequently found in offices or homes, that provides an optimized environment for work or relaxation, focusing on posture, accessibility, and reduced strain.
examples: The new office features several ergonomic pods for focused work.
She spent her afternoon in an ergonomic pod, designing the new software.
Many tech companies are investing in ergonomic pods to boost employee productivity.
